question: Why do you want to work at Goldman Sachs?
Why are you applying to J.P. Morgan and what attracts you to investment banking?
What motivates you to pursue a career in asset management at BlackRock?
Why do you want to work at Barclays and why markets specifically?
What draws you to advisory work and why Evercore over the bulge brackets?
Tell us about a time you led a team through a difficult challenge.
Describe a situation where you had to organise and lead a group project to a tight deadline.
Give an example of a time you were in charge of a project that did not go to plan. How did you lead through it?
Describe a time you worked effectively as part of a team to achieve a shared goal.
Tell us about a time you collaborated with others to solve a problem. What was your specific contribution?
Tell us about a time you failed at something. What did you learn and what would you do differently?
Describe a setback you experienced. How did you analyse what went wrong and move forward?
Discuss a current market trend or economic development that interests you and its implications for financial services.
What recent news story or deal in the financial markets caught your attention and why?
Describe a time you handled significant pressure or multiple competing deadlines. How did you manage?
Give an example of a challenging situation you faced. How did you stay focused and perform under pressure?
What are your key strengths and how will they contribute to the role?
Is there anything else you would like us to know about you that is not covered elsewhere in the application?
Tell us about a commercial development in a sector that interests you and how it might affect the deal landscape.
What experience, skill or interest outside of your degree makes you a distinctive candidate?
